## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.8

### 🛠️ Fixes
- Restores CO and CO Level entity creation for combo smoke/CO detectors such as XP0A-MR before late CO payload values arrive.
- Cleans up older `co_event_id` registry entries that are no longer provided by the integration.
- Adds a cleanup guard so obsolete entity cleanup cannot target currently supported platform entities.
